title: Monitor live trade feed and open a session
description: Verifies a guest can view agent status and stats on the home dashboard, expand the live trade feed to older sessions, and open a session detail from a session card.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live trade feed to finish loading
Scroll to the live trade feed section
Click the control to expand the feed to reveal older sessions
Click a session card to open its session detail
Verify session metadata is displayed on the session detail page
Verify the 5-step audit timeline is displayed

title: Review a session’s audit steps, raw JSON, and copy a step hash
description: Verifies a guest can expand each audit step to read reasoning, view raw JSON payloads, and copy a step hash from the session detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live trade feed to finish loading
Click a session card to open its session detail
Expand the POLICY audit step to reveal reasoning
Open the raw JSON payload disclosure for the POLICY step
Copy the POLICY step hash to clipboard
Expand the MARKET audit step to reveal reasoning
Expand the DECISION audit step to reveal reasoning
Expand the CHECK audit step to reveal reasoning
Expand the EXECUTION audit step to reveal reasoning
Verify all five audit steps can be expanded to show reasoning content
Verify a copy-to-clipboard success confirmation is visible

title: Open session detail from a session card
description: Verifies a guest can navigate from a live trade feed session card to the corresponding session detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live trade feed to finish loading
Click a session card to open its session detail
Verify session metadata is displayed
Verify the audit timeline steps are displayed

title: Portfolio summary renders value, P&L, holdings, and trade history
description: Verifies the home portfolio section loads and displays total value, aggregated P&L, holdings overview, and recent trade history for a guest.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the portfolio summary section to finish loading
Scroll to the portfolio summary section
Verify total portfolio value and aggregated P&L are displayed
Verify holdings and recent trade history entries are displayed

title: Trade feed cards show core session summary fields
description: Verifies the home live trade feed displays session cards with verdict, token, confidence, and amount so a guest can quickly assess recent activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live trade feed to finish loading
Scroll to the first visible session card in the trade feed
Verify a session card displays a verdict value, token symbol, confidence value, and trade amount

title: Portfolio trade history proof link drills into session detail
description: Verifies a guest can click a proof link from a trade history entry and land on the corresponding session detail page with the audit timeline visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the portfolio summary section to finish loading
Scroll to the trade history list
Click a proof link for a trade history entry
Verify the session detail page shows the 5-step audit timeline
Verify session metadata is displayed

title: Verify a session on-chain from session detail
description: A user can open a session from the home feed, run on-chain verification, and see match/mismatch badges for each of the 5 audit steps.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a session card to open its session detail page
Initiate on-chain verification for the session
Verify per-step verification results are displayed for all five audit steps
Verify each audit step shows a match or mismatch status badge

title: Live trade feed auto-refresh updates the session list
description: Verifies the live trade feed can refresh without manual action and continues to show recent sessions after a short wait.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live trade feed to finish loading
Wait for the feed polling interval to elapse and the feed to refresh
Verify the live trade feed still displays session cards after the refresh

title: Connect wallet and see address and balance
description: A user can connect a wallet and then sees the connected address and INIT balance reflected in the header and balance card.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate wallet connection from the header
Complete wallet connection in the wallet modal
Verify a connected wallet address is displayed in the header
Verify an INIT balance is displayed in the user balance card

title: Open strategy page and see wallet-gated prompt when disconnected
description: Verifies a visitor who is not wallet-connected is prompted to connect before viewing or saving policy settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /strategy
Wait for the strategy configuration view to finish loading
Verify a wallet connection prompt is displayed
Verify policy editing and saving controls are not available until a wallet is connected

title: Return to the feed from session detail
description: Verifies a guest can navigate back from a session detail page to the home dashboard to continue monitoring the live trade feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live trade feed to finish loading
Click a session card to open its session detail
Click the navigation control to return to the feed
Verify the user lands on the home dashboard
Verify the live trade feed is displayed

title: View attestations list and count for a session
description: A user can open a session and see the attestation count and a list of attestations for that session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a session card to open its session detail page
Scroll to the attestations section
Verify an attestation count is displayed
Verify an attestations list or an empty state is displayed

title: Connect wallet and load current policy
description: Verifies a wallet-connected user can connect and see current policy settings loaded for their address.

steps.description: Navigate to /strategy
Click the wallet connection prompt to start connecting a wallet
Complete the in-app wallet connection flow
Wait for the policy settings to finish loading
Verify current policy settings are displayed
Verify saving the policy is available when connected

title: Disconnect wallet returns to guest state
description: A user can disconnect their wallet and the UI returns to the guest state without showing the connected address.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Initiate wallet connection from the header
Complete wallet connection in the wallet modal
Disconnect the wallet from the wallet menu
Verify the header shows a disconnected state rather than a wallet address
Verify guest state is shown in the balance area

title: View analytics overview with charts
description: Verifies a visitor can load the analytics dashboard and see stat cards plus all analytics charts rendered from available data.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Wait for the analytics dashboard content to finish loading
Verify analytics stat cards are displayed
Verify the cumulative P&L chart, portfolio value chart, verdict breakdown chart, and confidence distribution chart are displayed

title: Edit and save policy successfully
description: Verifies a wallet-connected user can edit policy fields and save, with the UI reflecting the updated policy.

steps.description: Navigate to /strategy
Click the wallet connection prompt to start connecting a wallet
Complete the in-app wallet connection flow
Wait for the policy settings to finish loading
Fill a new valid number into the max spend field
Select a valid confidence threshold value
Fill a valid cooldown value into the cooldown field
Fill valid allowed tokens into the allowed tokens field
Submit the policy save action
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the updated policy is reflected in the UI

title: Collapse audit steps after expanding
description: Verifies a guest can collapse an expanded audit step to reduce on-screen detail while staying on the same session detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live trade feed to finish loading
Click a session card to open its session detail
Expand an audit step to reveal reasoning
Collapse the same audit step
Verify the audit step reasoning content is no longer displayed

title: Prompt to connect wallet when attempting to attest while disconnected
description: A user who is not wallet-connected is prompted to connect a wallet before they can submit an attestation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a session card to open its session detail page
Scroll to the attestations section
Attempt to submit an attestation
Verify a connect-wallet prompt is displayed and attestation submission is not available

title: Persisted policy after reload
description: Verifies a saved policy persists by reloading the strategy page and confirming the policy is still present.

steps.description: Navigate to /strategy
Click the wallet connection prompt to start connecting a wallet
Complete the in-app wallet connection flow
Wait for the policy settings to finish loading
Fill a new valid number into the max spend field
Submit the policy save action
Navigate to /strategy
Wait for the policy settings to finish loading
Verify policy settings are displayed for the connected address
Verify the saved policy remains reflected in the UI after reload

title: Analytics empty state when no session data
description: Verifies the analytics dashboard shows a non-crashing empty state when there are no sessions to chart.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Wait for the analytics dashboard content to finish loading
Verify an empty state for analytics sessions is displayed
Verify the page remains usable without charts rendering errors

title: Analytics loading state during data fetch
description: Verifies the analytics dashboard displays a loading state while fetching analytics data and then transitions to results.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Verify a loading state for analytics content is displayed
Wait for the analytics dashboard content to finish loading
Verify analytics charts or an empty state are displayed

title: Analytics chart rendering with minimal data
description: Verifies charts render without breaking when the dataset is minimal (for example a single data point).

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Wait for the analytics dashboard content to finish loading
Scroll to the chart sections
Verify the cumulative P&L and portfolio value charts render without missing-content errors

title: Validation prevents saving invalid policy values
description: Verifies entering an invalid policy value (such as a negative max spend) blocks saving and shows a field-level validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /strategy
Click the wallet connection prompt to start connecting a wallet
Complete the in-app wallet connection flow
Wait for the policy settings to finish loading
Fill a negative number into the max spend field
Submit the policy save action
Verify a field-level validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the policy form and the save is not completed

title: Analytics supports large datasets without UI breakage
description: Verifies the analytics dashboard remains navigable and charts remain visible when many sessions are present.

steps.description: Navigate to /analytics
Wait for the analytics dashboard content to finish loading
Scroll through the full analytics dashboard
Verify all chart sections remain displayed and the page remains responsive to scrolling
